CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

===========================

===========================

如需推送到遠端再告訴我。

  <investigated>[What has been explored so far? What was examined?]</investigated>
  <learned>[What have you learned about how things work?]</learned>
  <completed>[What work has been completed so far? What has shipped or changed?]</completed>
  <next_steps>[What are you actively working on or planning to work on next in this session?]</next_steps>

</summary>

attachment.content:
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings; ultra: deep multi-agent review in the cloud). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

  <what_happened>Read</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-06-16T07:38:37.882Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>G:\Cocos_Project\uk_pirates_queen</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"C:\\\\Users\\\\jiunchiwang\\\\.claude\\\\skills\\\\uk-slot-extrabet\\\\references\\\\architecture.md\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"C:\\\\Users\\\\jiunchiwang\\\\.claude\\\\skills\\\\uk-slot-extrabet\\\\references\\\\architecture.md\",\"content\":\"# ExtraBet 架構與整合\\n\\n## 目錄\\n- [三方資料流](#三方資料流)（變體 A 單倍率 / 變體 B 多倍率）\\n- [倍率表 info.Mul](#倍率表-infomul)\\n- [framework ExtraBetComponent API](#framework-extrabetcomponent-api)\\n- [ExtraBetWindow 跳窗](#extrabetwindow-跳窗)（變體 B 才用）\\n- [GameView 整合](#gameview-整合)（變體 A / B 範例）\\n- [顯隱與互斥規則](#顯隱與互斥規則)\\n\\n## 三方資料流\\n\\n### 變體 A：單倍率單步驟（isTwoStep=false，本專案 uk_slot_eye_strike）\\n\\n```\\n玩家點 EX 按鈕\\n  └─> ExtraBetComponent.ChangeBetMode()                 [framework: UI/動畫/狀態]\\n        ├─> newBottombarManager.ChangeMultiBet(Special) [立即切倍率]\\n        └─> triggerCb(isActive=true, isForce=false)     [GameView 注入]\\n              ├─> ClearAllForExtraBet()\\n              ├─> PlayExtraBetActiveAnimation()\\n              │     └─> eventManager.Dispatch(PLAY_ACTIVATE_EFFECT, resolve)\\n              │           └─> ExtraBetEffectManager.PlayActivateEffect()\\n              │                 ├─> AudioManager.Play(ExbetActive)\\n              │                 ├─> activateEffectSpine.PlayAnimation('In')\\n              │                 └─> DelayChangeSlotReelsPlateInfo(1)\\n              │                       └─> SlotReels.SetExtraBetInitPlateInfo()\\n              └─> [動畫完成 callback resolve]\\n```\\n\\n關閉時對稱：`triggerCb(false, false)` → `ClearAllForExtraBet()` → `SlotReels.SetInitPlateInfo()`。\\n\\n### 變體 B：多倍率兩步驟（isTwoStep=true）\\n\\n```\\n玩家點 EX 按鈕\\n  └─> ExtraBetComponent.ChangeBetMode()        [framework: UI/動畫/狀態]\\n        └─> triggerCb(isActive, isForce)        [GameView 注入的 callback]\\n              └─> ExtraBetWindow.ShowAndWait()  [專案: 跳窗選卡]\\n                    └─> { confirmed, type }\\n              └─> ExtraBetComponent.SetTwoStepMulti(confirmed, type)\\n                    └─> newBottombarManager.ChangeMultiBet(type)  [實際切換押注倍率]\\n```\\n\\n- **framework** 不知道有幾種倍率，只負責 UI/動畫與呼叫 `ChangeMultiBet(idx)`\\n- **專案** 透過 `triggerCb` 注入跳窗邏輯與倍率表，決定 `type`\\n- 倍率的真正套用在 `newBottombarManager.ChangeMultiBet(type)`（framework Manager）\\n\\n### 變體 A vs B 的關鍵差異\\n\\n| 項目 | 變體 A | 變體 B |\\n|------|--------|--------|\\n| `ChangeMultiBet` 觸發點 | `ChangeBetMode` 內**立即**呼叫 | `SetTwoStepMulti` 確認後才呼叫 |\\n| `triggerCb` 內等待 | 等 spine 動畫播完 | 等跳窗操作 + 動畫 |\\n| 玩家可選 type | 無（永遠 Special=1） | 多種（依 Mul 長度） |\\n| 取消路徑 | 無（直接 ON/OFF） | 跳窗取消 → 復原 m_isExtra |\\n\\n## 倍率表 info.Mul\\n\\n伺服器 GameInfo 提供 `info.Mul: number[]`：\\n\\n| 索引 | 意義 | 用途 |\\n|------|------|------|\\n| `Mul[0]` | 基礎倍率（一般幾乎為 1） | `ChangeMultiBet(TYPE.Normal=0)` 還原一般押注 |\\n| `Mul[1]` | 第一種 ExtraBet（TYPE.Special） | 跳窗第 1 張卡 / 預設強制種類 |\\n| `Mul[2]`, `Mul[3]`... | 其他 ExtraBet 倍率 | 跳窗第 2、3 張卡 |\\n\\nGameView 收到 GameInfo 後（`GameView.ts` 的 GameInfo 解碼處）：\\n```typescript\\nnewBottombarManager.SetMultiBetInfo({\\n    IsMulti: () => this.m_extraBetComp?.IsExtra ?? false,\\n    Multi: info.Mul\\n});\\nthis.m_betMultipliers = info.Mul.slice();          // 保存完整表供 unshow 反推 type\\nconst extraBetMultiplierRates = info.Mul.slice(1); // 跳窗只需 ExtraBet 倍率（去掉基礎）\\nthis.m_extraBetWindow?.Init( extraBetMultiplierRates );\\n```\\n\\n**對應關係**：跳窗卡片 `i`（0-based）顯示 `Mul[i+1]` → 玩家選中回傳 `type = i+1` → `ChangeMultiBet(type)` 套用 `Mul[type]`。三者索引一致，勿錯位。\\n\\n## framework ExtraBetComponent API\\n\\n| 方法 | 用途 |\\n|------|------|\\n| `Init(triggerCb, description, extraBetTxt, isTwoStep=false, isSpecial=false)` | 初始化。第 2、3 參數是 **i18n string key**（如 `Game_Define.StringKey.EXTRA_BET_DESC`），不是布林。`triggerCb: (isActive, isForce) => Promise<void>` 是遊戲多表演的注入點。內部會 `extraBetController.Init((isSpecial)?null:this.node, this.ForceSetExtraBet.bind(this))` 註冊全域 controller |\\n| `ForceSetExtraBet(isActive, type=TYPE.Special)` | 強制設值（跳過跳窗），unshow/replay 用。**注意 type 預設值** |\\n| `SetTwoStepMulti(isActive, type)` | 兩步驟確認後正式切倍率；取消則復原 |\\n| `ShowExtra(show)` | 顯隱整顆 EX 節點 |\\n| `OnSpin()` / `OnRotation()` | spin/轉動時收 Bar、播對應動畫 |\\n| `FirstShowBar()` | 進遊戲首次自動展開 Bar + 說明（已用過 force 則不彈） |\\n| `IsExtra`（getter） | 目前是否開啟 ExtraBet |\\n| `CheckCanUseBtn()` | 按鈕可用條件（見下方互斥規則） |\\n\\n**callback 兩個參數的意義**：\\n- `isActive`：要開啟還是關閉\\n- `isForce`：是否為強制路徑。`true` 時 GameView callback 應**跳過跳窗**（unshow/replay 不需玩家再選）\\n\\n**isTwoStep 行為差異**：\\n- `isTwoStep=true`：`ChangeBetMode` 先不切倍率，等跳窗 `SetTwoStepMulti` 確認才切（多倍率機台採用）\\n- `isTwoStep=false`：`ChangeBetMode` 直接 `ChangeMultiBet(TYPE.Special)`，無跳窗（本專案 `uk_slot_eye_strike` 採用，預設值）\\n\\n## ExtraBetWindow 跳窗\\n\\n專案自訂 UI（`assets/Script/ExtraBet/ExtraBetWindow.ts`），非 framework。\\n\\n- `Init(multiplierRates: number[])`：傳入 `Mul.slice(1)`，存為 `m_multiplierRates`\\n- `ShowAndWait(): Promise<{ confirmed, type }>`：顯示跳窗，等玩家操作後 resolve\\n  - `type = selectedIndex + 1`；`0` 表示未選/取消\\n- `SetPrice()`：卡片金額 = `tools.times(bet, m_multiplierRates[i])`\\n- 確認時 `newBottombarManager.SetNowBet(...)` 同步 bet，再 resolve\\n\\n## GameView 整合\\n\\n### 變體 A 範例（本專案 uk_slot_eye_strike，isTwoStep=false）\\n\\n```typescript\\nprivate InitExtraBet() {\\n    this.m_extraBetComp?.Init(\\n        async (_isActive: boolean, _isForce: boolean) => {\\n            let isPlayActiveAnimation = false;\\n            this.ClearAllForExtraBet();\\n            if (_isActive && !_isForce) {\\n                // 一般開啟：播激活動畫（內部會 DelayChangeSlotReelsPlateInfo）\\n                await this.PlayExtraBetActiveAnimation();\\n                isPlayActiveAnimation = true;\\n            }\\n            if (_isActive) {\\n                if (!isPlayActiveAnimation) {\\n                    // isForce 路徑（unshow 還原）沒播動畫 → 手動切假轉輪盤\\n                    this.m_slotReels.SetExtraBetInitPlateInfo();\\n                }\\n            } else {\\n                this.m_slotReels.SetInitPlateInfo();\\n            }\\n        },\\n        Game_Define.StringKey.EXTRA_BET_DESC,\\n        Game_Define.StringKey.MG_SPECIAL_TXT\\n        // isTwoStep / isSpecial 未傳 → 預設 false\\n    );\\n    this.m_extraBetComp?.ShowExtra(false);  // 啟動先隱藏，等 info ack 才 ShowExtraBet()\\n}\\n\\npublic async RestoreExtraBetState() {\\n    // 單倍率：不帶 type，預設 TYPE.Special=1 剛好對\\n    await this.m_extraBetComp?.ForceSetExtraBet( true );\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### 變體 B 範例（多倍率機台，isTwoStep=true）\\n\\n```typescript\\nthis.m_extraBetComp?.Init(\\n    async (_isActive, _isForce) => {\\n        this.ClearAllForExtraBet();\\n        if (_isActive && !_isForce) {           // 一般開啟 → 跳窗\\n            await this.PlayExtraBetActiveAnimation();\\n            const result = await this.m_extraBetWindow?.ShowAndWait();\\n            await this.m_extraBetComp?.SetTwoStepMulti(result?.confirmed ?? false, result?.type ?? 0);\\n        } else if (!_isActive) {\\n            // 關閉時的清理\\n        }\\n        // _isForce=true（unshow/replay）：不跳窗，倍率已由 ForceSetExtraBet 內的 ChangeMultiBet 處理\\n    },\\n    Game_Define.StringKey.EXTRA_BET_DESC,\\n    Game_Define.StringKey.MG_SPECIAL_TXT,\\n    true  // isTwoStep\\n);\\n```\\n\\n## 顯隱與互斥規則\\n\\n- **僅主遊戲顯示**：進免費遊戲須 `SetExtraBetVisible(false)`。注意 unshow 還原進 FreeGame 的路徑可能繞過 `EnterFreeState`，須在 `RestoreUI` 之後手動隱藏，且須在 inactive 之前完成 `RestoreExtraBetState` 動畫 await（否則 await 不 resolve）\\n- **info ack 才顯示**：伺服器資料就緒後才 `ShowExtraBet()`，避免倍率表未到就讓玩家操作\\n- **BuyBonus 互斥**：啟用 BuyBonus 時關閉 ExtraBet 並取消啟用；`CheckCanUseBtn()` 已排除 `buyBonusManager.IsBuyBonus`\\n- **可用條件全集**：`Define.IsInMG() && CommonState.IDLE && !Define.IsUsingItem && !buyBonusManager.IsBuyBonus && !newExtraManager.IsFeaturesDemoMode && !CheckSwitchOff(CloseExtraBet)`\\n\",\"numLines\":176,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":176}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

content.thinking:
This is reading the architecture.md file from the uk-slot-extrabet skill. The user is asking whether something can be supplemented to the skill, and now Claude is examining the existing skill documentation to understand what's already there before deciding what to add.

This is a discovery action - learning about the existing skill structure and content. The file contains detailed documentation about the ExtraBet architecture including data flow, multiplier tables, framework API, window integration, and GameView integration patterns.

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>ExtraBet Architecture Documentation Details</title>
  <subtitle>Comprehensive documentation covers two-variant data flow, multiplier tables, framework API, and integration patterns</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>architecture.md documents two ExtraBet variants: Variant A (single multiplier, isTwoStep=false) and Variant B (multiple multipliers, isTwoStep=true)</fact>
    <fact>Data flow shows ExtraBetComponent.ChangeBetMode() triggering newBottombarManager.ChangeMultiBet() with GameView callback injection</fact>
    <fact>Multiplier table info.Mul maps server indices to TYPE values: Mul[0] for Normal, Mul[1+] for Special ExtraBet rates</fact>
    <fact>ExtraBetWindow.ShowAndWait() returns {confirmed, type} where type = selectedIndex + 1 to align with Mul array indexing</fact>
    <fact>Visibility rules enforce ExtraBet only in main game, with mutual exclusion against BuyBonus and features demo mode</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The architecture documentation details a two-variant ExtraBet system. Variant A (used in uk_slot_eye_strike) uses a single-step flow where ChangeBetMode() immediately calls ChangeMultiBet(Special) and triggers spine activation animations. Variant B implements a two-step flow requiring ExtraBetWindow popup for multiplier selection before confirming the bet change. The multiplier table from server GameInfo (info.Mul array) maps to TYPE enum values, with Mul[0] as base rate and Mul[1+] as ExtraBet rates. The framework ExtraBetComponent API provides Init(), ForceSetExtraBet() for unshow/replay paths, SetTwoStepMulti() for two-step confirmation, and visibility controls. Integration patterns show callback parameters (isActive, isForce) determining whether to trigger animations or skip directly to state restoration. Visibility rules enforce main-game-only display with mutual exclusion against BuyBonus and demo modes.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>gotcha</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>C:/Users/jiunchiwang/.claude/skills/uk-slot-extrabet/references/architecture.md</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

Claude's Full Response to User:
讀完現況，評估如下。

## 評估結論：值得補充（但要寫成「通用模式」，非專案瑣事）

`references/architecture.md` 的變體 B 範例（149-168 行）跟我這次改的 `InitExtraBet` 幾乎一模一樣——而且它也停在同樣的空分支。我這次踩到的兩件事，**現有 skill 完全沒涵蓋**，且對任何「ExtraBet 驅動持久視覺」的變體 B 機台都成立：

| 可重用洞察 | 為何通用 | 現況 |
|-----------|---------|------|
| **`triggerCb(isActive, isForce)` 不帶 type** → 強制還原路徑 callback 拿不到 type，驅動的視覺必須在**呼叫端**（`RestoreExtraBetState`，type 已知）補套用，不能塞 callback | 任何變體 B 還原路徑都成立；架構文件的 API 表沒點出「callback 無 type」的後果 | 未涵蓋 |
| **ExtraBet 驅動的持久視覺若被某 GameState per-spin reset**（如 SpinState 把乘倍底板 reset 0/隱藏），該 reset 必須 ExtraBet-aware，否則每轉被抹掉 | fake reel 整合那節只講「開關時切盤」，沒講「其他狀態的 per-spin reset 會反覆抹掉 ExtraBet 視覺」這個跨狀態陷阱 | 未涵蓋 |

乘倍底板本身是 pirates_queen 專屬，但**「callback 無 type → 呼叫端補」+「per-spin reset 要 ExtraBet-aware」**是可跨機台重用的整合陷阱，符合 skill 收錄標準（非 one-off、跨專案適用）。

## 建議落點與草稿

`references/architecture.md` 變體 B 範例後加一小節，SKILL.md「修改/除錯」清單加一行指標。草稿：

> **### ExtraBet 驅動持久視覺（盤面 / 乘倍底板）的兩個陷阱（變體 B）**
> ExtraBet 開關常需連動持久視覺（`SlotReels` 預設盤、乘倍底板 index…）。除了在 callback 一般路徑切換，還有兩個非顯而易見的陷阱：
> 1. **`triggerCb(isActive, isForce)` 不帶 type**。強制還原路徑（`ForceSetExtraBet` → `triggerCb(_, isForce=true)`）callback 看不到 type，視覺切換要在**呼叫端**補：`RestoreExtraBetState` 內算出 type → `ForceSetExtraBet(true, type)` 後，立即依同一 type 套用視覺。
> 2. **per-spin reset 會反覆抹掉**。若該視覺被某 GameState 每轉 reset（例：`SpinState` 開轉時把乘倍底板 `SET_MULTIPLIER -1,0 + SET_SHOW false`），該 reset 必須 ExtraBet-aware——ExtraBet 開啟時改為「重套用 ExtraBet 對應狀態」而非清成預設，否則玩家每轉看到底板被清掉。作法：GameView 存目前 ExtraBet type，reset 處先判斷再決定 reset 或 refresh。

---

⚠️ **誠實提醒**：writing-skills 的 Iron Law 要求「skill 編輯前先跑 baseline 失敗測試」（派 subagent 驗證沒這段時會漏）。對這種小篇幅 reference 補充我可以：
- **(A)** 直接補上述草稿（務實、跳過正式 RED-GREEN）
- **(B)** 先派一個 subagent 跑 baseline（給它變體 B 還原 + per-spin reset 情境，看會不會漏），確認失敗再補——較嚴謹但多花一輪

   - Per-spin resets in GameStates need to be ExtraBet-aware to avoid wiping ExtraBet visuals every spin

content.text:
<summary>
  <request>Evaluate whether recent ExtraBet implementation changes (GameView.ts, SpinState.ts) should supplement uk-slot-extrabet skill documentation</request>
  <investigated>Examined uk-slot-extrabet skill structure (SKILL.md, architecture.md, unshow-restore.md totaling 1682 words); reviewed architecture.md's Variant B integration patterns and identified documentation gaps</investigated>
  <learned>Current architecture.md documents data flow and basic integration but lacks two critical cross-project gotchas: (1) triggerCb callback doesn't receive type parameter, requiring visual state application in calling code during restoration; (2) per-spin GameState resets must be ExtraBet-aware to avoid wiping persistent ExtraBet visuals each spin</learned>
  <completed>Identified two reusable integration patterns from pirates_queen ExtraBet work that apply to any Variant B slot machine with persistent ExtraBet-driven visuals; drafted supplement text for architecture.md</completed>
  <next_steps>Awaiting user decision on documentation approach: (A) direct addition of gotchas section to architecture.md, or (B) baseline failure test via subagent before adding documentation</next_steps>
  <notes>The learnings are framework-level patterns rather than project-specific details, meeting skill documentation criteria for cross-project reusability; both gotchas stem from architectural constraints that affect any multi-multiplier ExtraBet implementation</notes>
</summary>
